title: FR24 Event Candidate
description: A single OCR-derived candidate flight/event record extracted from a FlightRadar24 screenshot. All fields are candidates requiring review. No automatic confirmation labels are emitted.

image_path.description: Relative or absolute path to the source screenshot. Never mutated.

sidecar_path.description: Path to linked Google Takeout supplemental-metadata JSON, if reconciled.

sidecar_title.description: Title field from the linked sidecar JSON.

resolved_status.description: One-to-one sidecar assignment status from fr24_sidecar_reconcile.py.

ocr_region.description: Name of the image region that was OCR-ed (whole-image, panel, callsign, altitude, speed, route, map, unknown).

region_type.description: Semantic type of the image region.

region_bbox.description: Bounding box of the cropped region as JSON {x,y,w,h} or serialized string.

parser_version.description: Version of the parser that produced this record.

callsign_or_label.description: OCR-extracted callsign or aircraft label. Candidate only.

registration.description: OCR-extracted aircraft registration (N-number or equivalent). Candidate only.

aircraft_type.description: OCR-extracted aircraft type/model string. Candidate only.

origin_code.description: OCR-extracted origin airport code. Candidate only.

destination_code.description: OCR-extracted destination airport code. Candidate only.

barometric_altitude_ft.description: OCR-extracted barometric altitude in feet. Candidate only.

ground_speed_mph.description: OCR-extracted ground speed in mph. Candidate only.

flight_status.description: Candidate flight status derived from OCR text. Candidate only.

playback_date.description: Candidate playback date parsed from FR24 UI timestamp.

playback_time.description: Candidate playback time parsed from FR24 UI timestamp.

playback_timezone.description: Candidate timezone offset parsed from FR24 UI timestamp.

confidence.description: Heuristic confidence score [0.0–1.0] based on number of populated fields.

review_status.description: Current review disposition. No confirmed labels are permitted.

conflict_fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names where whole-image and region OCR disagree.

region_source_count.description: Number of region OCR rows fused into this record.

ocr_text_excerpt.description: First 500–700 characters of raw OCR text for reference.
